gridDrag.title: Drag to select a time slot
gridDrag.description: Drag on the calendar to choose when you want to work on something

selectTag.title: Pick a tag to create your plan
selectTag.description: Choose an existing tag, or create a new one — it becomes both the label and title of your plan

clickEntry.title: Click to view details
clickEntry.description: Click the block you just created to open the inspector — edit time, tags, and notes

planVsRecord.title: Plans vs Records
planVsRecord.description: A plan is what you intend to do. Once its time passes, it automatically becomes a record — what you actually did. You can always adjust the recorded time later.
